GAMMA_WALL_EXPLANATION:
What Are Gamma Walls?

Gamma walls represent strike prices with exceptionally high open interest where options dealers must hedge their positions. These levels act as natural support (put wall) and resistance (call wall) because dealers' hedging activity creates buying pressure below the put wall and selling pressure above the call wall.

Current Analysis:

  • Put Wall ($60.00): Strong support level - large put OI forces dealers to buy shares if price approaches this level
  • Call Wall ($70.00): Strong resistance - large call OI forces dealers to sell shares if price approaches this level
  • Band Width: $10.00 (15.2% of current price) - wide range suggests larger expected movement
  • Current Position: Price at $65.94 is above center of gamma band
  • Confidence: 10% based on OI concentration and volume analysis

Trading Implication:

The gamma walls at $60 and $70 define the expected trading range. Our iron condor strikes are positioned to profit from price remaining within this dealer-enforced range while providing defined-risk protection if price breaks through these levels.
